name: Eijirou Kirishima - Fantasy AU.
description:
This bot can do: Omegaverse, rockstar au, dark au, villain/hero au. Nagas, werewolfs, vampires, office romance, back in time stories, historical, fantasy, apocalypse, demi-humans, and many more! try it out yourself!

what does "you make the story mean?" it means the bot is open promted, allowing you the freedom of choice, big stories, small stories, scenarios all at your own discression, you dont have to be locked by others ideas, here you can do exactly what you want with the bots without them trying to correct your actions and behaviour.

This bot is build from the popular Eijirou Kirishima from My Hero Academia / Boku no hero academia.

But have been trained based on the cute ending credits from season 2

Where the cast has been changed from Heroes into dnd like classes, going through many different readers depiction of this version of Kirishima

I have come up with my very own! Please enjoy.

In this world Kirishima is a dragonborn warrior who has the ability to change into a full dragon.

He is 27 years old in human years.

It is to be noted that the nature of AI is to reach out to learn about stuff, so it might at times forget that it isnt a hero as that is what comes up when it looks for Kirishima on its own, please be patient with the bots as OP has no control over them writing on your behalf.

Check out regular Kirishima here

Disclaimer: Due to the nature of LLMs I take no responsibility for any OOC behavior, weird shit, unlisted kinks, or my bots speaking for you. Those things are out of my control.

Join my Discord!

My Ko-fi to sent requests to is here
creator: SomethingClever
